concept: Confirmação de combo: um badge diamante ciano recebe dois chevrons, ganha uma corrente violeta, confirma três ticks dourados e comprime num brilho branco-azul.
selectionRationale: Entrega nova de HUD, distinta de streak pop, confirmation, ability-ready flare, meter fill tick, capture lock, fuse timer warning, respawn pips, carrier crown ping e damage direction wedge por comunicar continuidade de combo com corrente e ticks progressivos.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 4x4 sprite sheet for a Bomba PvP short HUD animation. Primary request: create a coherent sixteen-frame animation of a combo-chain confirmation burst, arranged as a clean 4x4 grid in row-major order. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor, or reflections. Subject: a compact cyan diamond HUD badge appears, two small linked chevrons snap in from left and right, a thin violet chain arc wraps once behind the badge, three gold ticks confirm the chain, then the badge compresses into a bright white-blue star and settles. Style/medium: polished high-contrast game HUD VFX, crisp cel-shaded 2.5D illustration, readable at small runtime size, consistent scale and lighting across all frames. Composition/framing: one centered badge per cell, generous padding, no overlap between cells, no clipping. Lighting/mood: fast, rewarding, competitive arcade feedback. Color palette: electric cyan, deep navy, violet, warm gold, white highlights. Constraints: sixteen distinct sequential poses; frame 00 a visible tiny cyan badge spark, frames 01-04 chevrons snap in, frames 05-08 chain arc wraps, frames 09-11 gold ticks confirm, frames 12-15 white-blue star compression and settle; do not use #00ff00 in the subject. Avoid: readable text, numbers, UI panels, characters, weapons, logos, generic explosion rings, flames, smoke clouds, water, extra objects, gradients or variation in the chroma-key background, watermark.

source.note: source-upscaled-2048.png é derivado por Lanczos e não uma fonte nativa 2048px

pipeline.alphaPreparation: remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key border, soft-matte, despill e edge-contract 1
pipeline.frameExtraction: ImageMagick: source-grid-1248 dividido em 16 células 232px, recortadas com margem interna de 40px, redimensionadas para 240px e centralizadas em 312px

animation.alpha: RGBA; fundo chroma-key removido; borda interna transparente

delegation.request: Conferir grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas sem tocar em outros paths, instalar ou fazer git.
delegation.result: Invocação feita no diretório exclusivo; o wrapper encerrou com falha após reportar o escopo, sem gerar arquivos e sem produzir validação utilizável.
delegation.imagine: Não disponível no ambiente Grok; a fonte foi criada pelo image_gen integrado.
delegation.fallback: Extração, organização e validação concluídas localmente com ImageMagick.

validation.commandResult: frames=16 empty=0 edgeHits=0 badDims=0 sourceSheet=1248x1248 runtimeSheet=1024x1024 contactSheet=1024x1024 gifFrames=16 timingCentiseconds=6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6
